abilities.description: Shuffle your libary, then reveal the top card. If it's a nonland card, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield and return CARDNAME to its owner's hand.

effect.description: Shuffle your libary, then reveal the top card. If it's a nonland card, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield and return CARDNAME to its owner's hand.
effect.name: Shuffle
